test-method.name: atc001_loginWithLockedOutUser
test-method.description: Login with locked out user

exception.message: Expected error message according to spreadsheet not found. Actual: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out. expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected error message according to spreadsheet not found. Actual: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:99) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1037) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:45) at tests.LoginTests.atc001_loginWithLockedOutUser(LoginTests.java:16) at test-method.description: Open burger menu

test-method.name: menu002_closeBurgerMenuWithX
test-method.description: Close burger menu with X

test-method.name: menu003_openCartFromHeaderIcon
test-method.description: Open cart from header icon

test-method.name: menu004_allItemsReturnsToInventory
test-method.description: All Items link returns to Inventory

test-method.name: menu005_logout
test-method.description: Logout from burger menu

test-method.name: menu006_resetAppStateClearsCart
test-method.description: Reset App State clears cart badge

test-method.name: menu007_resetAppStateKeepsUserLoggedIn
test-method.description: Reset App State keeps user logged in

test-method.name: menu008_resetAppStateResetsButtons
test-method.description: Reset App State resets 'Remove' buttons back to 'Add to cart'

exception.message: Product's button changes back to Add to cart expected [Add to cart] but found [Remove]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Product's button changes back to Add to cart expected [Add to cart] but found [Remove] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:99) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1037) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:140) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:122) at test-method.description: About link opens Sauce Labs page

test-method.description: Menu open/close does not break page actions

test-method.description: Open product details

test-method.name: atc001_completeOrder1Item
test-method.description: Complete order with valid checkout info (1 item)

test-method.name: atc002_checkoutValidationEmpty
test-method.description: Checkout info validation: all fields empty

test-method.name: atc003_removeProductAndContinueShopping
test-method.description: Remove product from cart and continue shopping

test-method.name: atc004_completeOrder2Items
test-method.description: Complete order with multiple items (2 items)

test-method.name: atc005_checkoutValidationMissingLastName
test-method.description: Checkout info validation: missing Last Name

test-method.name: atc006_checkoutValidationMissingPostalCode
test-method.description: Checkout info validation: missing Postal Code

test-method.name: atc007_checkoutStepOneCancel
test-method.description: Checkout Step One: Cancel returns to Cart

test-method.name: atc008_checkoutOverviewCancel
test-method.description: Checkout Overview: Cancel returns to Inventory

test-method.name: atc009_checkoutOverviewVerifyMath3Items
test-method.description: Checkout Overview: verify price math (3 items)

test-method.name: atc010_finishOrderClearsCart
test-method.description: Finish order clears the cart

test-method.name: atc011_cannotSkipStepOne
test-method.description: User cannot skip Step One and open Overview directly

exception.message: User is blocked from Overview expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: User is blocked from Overview expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:99) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1037) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:45) at tests.CheckoutTests.atc011_cannotSkipStepOne(CheckoutTests.java:191) at
